{{CargoRelic
|name=Tuesday Star
|class_id=20293
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Fortune Law 3: If faced with setbacks, do not lose heart, for good luck will soon follow!
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=31
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss2=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss3=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss4=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss7=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail DEF +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800<br> (Awakened)
}}
